creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #9)
> I'm confused, why isn't the license installed with the LICENSE framework,
> e.g. LICENSE_FILE ?

See the last paragraph of the original submission.

Also, I have no idea what LICENSE_FILE does. It's not described in the PHB, and bsd.licenses.mk only says the variable exists, not what it does.
